ab: ralu’ ni yaba’ mu ga Baycu’.
ralu’ ni yaya’ mu ga Iwal.
magalpu kaal mu kaal ka hani.
kiya qutux qumisuwan na mamaliku mu, ralu’ niya’ ga Bawtu’, magalpu cu qutux kaal niya’ kaal ka hani.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Bawtu’，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Bawtu’, he is 11 years old.

ab: maglu cami mateq i qutux papatiqan.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: balayq mu ki qumisuwan na mamaliku ku maquwas.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: balayq mu ku lumanguy, muhngeq kuwing ga, maglu cami ka qutux cu imuwag musa’ i lumanguy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: balayq mu ku makasbabaq cu giqas ka rawin, naki cami maglu musa’ i maquwas ru lumanguy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
